decisions.title: Address Critical Memory Issues Before Feature Work
decisions.context: Multiple memory leaks detected: unbounded ingest buffer growth (ENG-9391), exports leaking (ENG-9344), data-batcher OOMs (ENG-9133). These threaten system stability and customer trust—core pillar priority.
decisions.blockedBy: Resource allocation between stability vs. feature roadmap

arguments.for: System reliability is foundation for 'Decisions Captured'—no decisions if system is down. Aligns with 'Nail the Core' pillar.
arguments.against: Delays Canvas, Python Rules, and Explore V2 polish that drive customer engagement and North Star metric growth.

decisions.title: Prioritize Explore V2 Migration Completion
decisions.context: ENG-8140 covers migration link/banner/intercept. Multiple UX polish items (ENG-9106, ENG-9420, ENG-9418) ready. Explore V2 is key 2026 product for 'Embed Deeper' pillar.
decisions.blockedBy: None—work is scoped and in progress

arguments.for: Directly increases Decisions Captured per customer by improving UX. Enables sunsetting Explore V1, reducing tech debt.
arguments.against: Engineering capacity stretched by infrastructure issues. May need to staff up or deprioritize other work.

decisions.title: Commit to Cold Storage Architecture (Catalog Update + Read Service)
decisions.context: ENG-9396 and ENG-9395 are spike tickets for catalog update and cold storage read services. Critical for 'Build the Moat'—enables long-term data retention at scale.
decisions.blockedBy: Spike completion and RFC approval (ENG-9238 spec out RFC)

arguments.for: Differentiator vs competitors. Enables K2 Mission pipeline (ENG-9104) and streaming aggregates (ENG-7847). Strategic moat-building.
arguments.against: High complexity, long timeline. May distract from near-term revenue drivers like Canvas and Python Rules.

decisions.title: Invest in DevEx: CI/CD and Tooling Stability
decisions.context: ENG-9421 CI/CD runner out of disk space. ENG-8933 internal CLI tooling needs packaging. Developer velocity directly impacts all pillars.

arguments.for: Force multiplier—improves speed across all product work. Reduces friction for 'Nail the Core' execution.
arguments.against: Not directly customer-facing. Tempting to defer for feature work, but compounds tech debt.

decisions.title: Channel List V2 Scope and Timeline
decisions.context: ENG-9077 Channel List V2 in progress. Impacts Canvas and Explore V2 usability. Needs clarity on MVP vs. full scope.
decisions.blockedBy: Design review DES-151 (context menu audit) and UX decisions

arguments.for: Core interaction model for Canvas. Better channel management = more decisions captured. Aligns with 'Embed Deeper.'
arguments.against: Could be split into phases. Full scope might delay Canvas GA.

timeAudit.weekSummary: Heavy meeting load (80% of week). Three 1:1s today suggest people need guidance—likely on prioritization between stability and features.
alerts: Only 2 focus blocks today—insufficient for strategic thinking on cold storage decision.
32 meeting hours this week exceeds healthy threshold (24h). Consider declining or delegating.
No maker time Thursday or Friday—risk of becoming blocker for team decisions.
